response: The first-time setup felt clear. I finished in under five minutes.
Too many steps before I could try the main feature. Almost quit twice.
Support replied quickly but the answer did not solve my billing issue.
I only use two features weekly. The rest feels like clutter in the menu.
I am cautious about linking my bank account. A clearer security page would help.
Text is readable but some buttons are too small on my phone.
Loved the short video. It showed exactly what I could do first.
Search works well. Filters could remember what I picked last time.
Great chat experience. The bot handed off to a human when I asked.
Privacy policy was long. A simple summary at the top would be nicer.
